channel.title: observations on Prajwal S N
channel.description: Recent content in observations on Prajwal S N

item.title: A world full of turtles
item.description: You might stare at the title and think I have lost my marbles, but if you have ever heard the phrase “turtles all the way down”, you know what I am talking about. We live in a world where everything is sitting on layers and layers of abstraction, to the point where a single push of a button can deliver the result of a gazillion different processes in less than the time it takes for you to even think about one of those processes.
